intro: Over a ten-article span from April 14 to April 26, 2026, ZCyberNews covered botnet activity featuring seven high-severity incidents. Threat actors Mirai, The Gentlemen, and W3LL were observed, with exploitation tied to CVE-2025-29635 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2024-3721 (CVSS 6.3), and CVE-2023-33538. Affected sectors included telecommunications, corporate, finance, and internet infrastructure, with impacts reported across Canada, the Czech Republic, Germany, the United States, and globally.
